problem.plain_language: 더클린커피에는 Google 클릭 흔적 3건이 있지만, campaign_id가 남지 않아 어느 캠페인에서 온 클릭인지 볼 수 없다.

root_causes.evidence: 2026-05-21 coffee live smoke found gclid stored, but gbraid/wbraid/gad_campaignid were not structured fields.
root_causes.impact: A campaign hint can be present in the URL string but not be available to checkout/payment payloads.
thecleancoffee can fan out into site_landing_ledger, but minimal paid_click_intent_ledger write is not available for coffee.

root_causes.evidence: buildAllowedQueryJson reads gad_campaignid from sanitized_landing_url only; buildPaidClickIntentNoSendPreview can see landing/current, but recordPaidClickIntent does not receive sanitized_current_url or explicit gad fields.
root_causes.impact: If campaign id is only on current_url or explicit payload field, the ledger allowed_query_json may miss it.

root_causes.evidence: final-url-audit shows thecleancoffee final URL row with no manual UTM, no tracking template, and no final URL suffix rows.
root_causes.impact: Google click IDs may arrive without gad_campaignid unless Google Ads URL suffix/tracking template supplies it.

recommended_design.name: thecleancoffee_campaign_id_capture_v1
recommended_design.principle: Do not promote gad_campaignid to a click ID or purchase. Preserve it only as a campaign hint next to gclid/gbraid/wbraid.

phases.action: Keep no-raw aggregate preview and Slack warning.
phases.success_criteria: Google spend remains zero candidate, click evidence warning remains explicit.

phases.action: Allow site='thecleancoffee' in paid-click-intent receiver and persist gad_campaignid from explicit field, sanitized_landing_url, or sanitized_current_url into allowed_query_json.
phases.success_criteria: No-send test returns no site_not_allowed for thecleancoffee, external platform sends remain 0, raw output remains 0.

phases.action: Update coffee browser capture path so gclid/gbraid/wbraid/gad_source/gad_campaignid are stored as one Google click set without stale mixing.
phases.success_criteria: Preview smoke shows gad_campaignid in storage/payload and no purchase/send/upload.

phases.phase: P3 Red Google Ads setting only if ads resume
phases.action: Add Google Ads final URL suffix or tracking template for coffee campaigns to include gad_source=1 and gad_campaignid={campaignid}.
phases.success_criteria: Future Google clicks carry campaign id hint; no conversion action or upload changes.

changes: Pass sanitized_current_url, gad_campaignid, and gad_source into recordPaidClickIntent.
Make buildAllowedQueryJson prefer preview.gad_campaignid, then landing_url param, then current_url param.
Keep hasGoogleClickId requirement based on gclid/gbraid/wbraid only.
non_goals: No purchase promotion from gad_campaignid-only rows.

rules: Select gclid/gbraid/wbraid as one source set.
Do not mix stale wbraid from storage into fresh gclid/gbraid URL.
Preserve gad_campaignid and gad_source as campaign hint.
Do not treat gad_campaignid-only as Google click ID.
Do not send purchase or conversion events.

approval_packet.title: 더클린커피 campaign_id capture hardening backend + preview
approval_packet.lane: Yellow for backend deploy and tracking preview; Red only for GTM Production publish or Google Ads campaign setting change
allowed_if_approved: Backend no-send receiver patch and VM deploy/restart
hard_fail: raw click ID or customer PII exposed
thecleancoffee click rows get marked as purchase
